readme_changes: Benchmark command now records --ylong-client sync, --client-order interleaved, and --client-order-seed 20260707.
Result paths now point to gen006-benchmark-trust-repaired.
Table now reports paired throughput ratio, 95% CI, and SOTA gate per cell.
The old gen005 SOTA statement was replaced by a repaired-gate withdrawal verdict.

figure_check.title: ylong_http_client sync vs libcurl library: paired throughput geomean 1.104x, worst cell 0.909x, errors 0

sota_verdict.threshold: paired throughput geomean >= 1.20x with no rejecting anomaly gate
sota_verdict.reason: No repaired matrix cell reaches pass_sota20, the paired geomean is below 1.20x, and all HTTP-over-HTTPS-proxy cells are rejected by proxy-send anomaly gates.
